patch.value: Include web package tests in release readiness, stop tracking generated pm runtime/search cache artifacts, and commit generated frontend/graph outputs during daily releases.
release:check runs tests; generated pm runtime/search artifacts are ignored and removed from git tracking; daily release commits include public/src and extensions/pm-graph/dist outputs
release:check runs tests; generated pm runtime/search artifacts are ignored and removed from git tracking; package is private; GitHub Actions workflows are removed from the website repo
Include web package tests in release readiness, stop tracking generated pm runtime/search cache artifacts, and align website governance with the private/no-GitHub-runners policy.

value.author: codex
value.text: GitHub audit showed pm-web was public and still had CI/changelog/release workflows despite the website no-runner policy. Marked package private locally and removed workflows; repo visibility will be changed with gh after commit/push prep.

patch.value: Added npm test to release:check, removed generated pm runtime/search artifacts from git tracking where present, updated ignore rules, and applied website no-runner/private package governance for pm-web.
Release readiness checks exercise tests and generated local pm caches are not tracked.
Package test sweep completed successfully; npm audit endpoint failures were isolated to registry responses rather than package test failures.
Release readiness hardening implemented and npm test passed for the package sweep.
